ValidationRule.description: The duration of the absence must be within the range.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, NOT(Timetracker__r.Id = "003b000001oHTRE"), DurationHhMmN__c <>4.00, DurationHhMmN__c <>8.00, DurationHhMmN__c <>5.00, DurationHhMmN__c <>7.50, OR( ISPICKVAL(Package__r.AbacusTimeType__c,"105"), ISPICKVAL(Package__r.AbacusTimeType__c,"1135"), ISPICKVAL(Package__r.AbacusTimeType__c,"115"), ISPICKVAL(Package__r.AbacusTimeType__c,"130"), ISPICKVAL(Package__r.AbacusTimeType__c,"140"), ISPICKVAL(Package__r.AbacusTimeType__c,"155"), ISPICKVAL(Package__r.AbacusTimeType__c,"160"), ISPICKVAL(Package__r.AbacusTimeType__c,"300") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Duration is 4.00 for half day, and 8.00 for full day absence. (TC015)
